PyCon 2025

The Annual Python Conference

Bringing together developers, data scientists, and enthusiasts for talks, workshops, and networking.

Register Now View Schedule

About PyCon 2025

Join the Python Community

PyCon 2025 is the premier annual conference for the Python programming community. Whether you're a seasoned developer, data scientist, or just starting your Python journey, PyCon offers something for everyone.

Attend keynote presentations from industry leaders, participate in hands-on workshops, and network with thousands of Python enthusiasts from around the world.

Learn about the latest trends in Python development, artificial intelligence, data science, web development, and more.

🎤 Keynotes

Inspiring talks from industry leaders and Python core developers.

🛠️ Workshops

Hands-on learning sessions covering various Python topics and frameworks.

🤝 Networking

Connect with thousands of Python developers and enthusiasts.

💡 Innovation

Discover cutting-edge projects and emerging technologies in the Python ecosystem.

Conference Schedule

Day 1 - Morning

Opening Keynote

Join us for an inspiring opening keynote from a Python core developer discussing the future of the language.

Day 1 - Afternoon

Parallel Tracks

Choose from multiple concurrent sessions covering web development, data science, DevOps, and more.

Day 2 - Morning

Workshop Sessions

Hands-on workshops led by experts. Topics include FastAPI, Machine Learning, and Cloud Development.

Day 2 - Afternoon

Lightning Talks

Quick 5-minute presentations from community members sharing their projects and insights.

Day 3 - Morning

Advanced Topics

Deep-dive sessions on performance optimization, async programming, and advanced Python patterns.

Day 3 - Afternoon

Closing Ceremony

Wrap-up with community announcements, awards, and networking reception.

Venue & Location

📍 Interactive Map Coming Soon

Conference Location

Convention Center

123 Tech Boulevard
San Francisco, CA 94105
United States

The venue is easily accessible by public transportation and offers ample parking for attendees. Nearby hotels and restaurants are available for your convenience.

Accessibility: The venue is fully wheelchair accessible with accessible restrooms and parking available.

Register for PyCon 2025

Secure your spot at the premier Python conference. Early bird tickets are available now!
